so.

i love lohen. pretends to be shocked

i've been getting requests for more lohen like every other day, so here. HERE! come get your food!!!

this is sort of a sequel to my first lohen bot in that not much has changed, just more scenarios. and more lohen. ALWAYS more lohen. i've never created a follow up bot without implementing new stuff, but lohen is........ 🤤🤩🤥🤧🤪🥰😩🧍‍♂️💦🫦👅🫪

...anyways. y'all get me, right? right???

edit: 2 new greetings added! which brings us to a total of 6 + 1 MYOS option. i may be all lohen'ed out for the near future 💀

────── ｡ﾟ★: * ──────


new greetings! includes 7 greetings (anypov):

⚔️ oh no! lohen has gone missing!
⚔️ new! you're a face from his past, and lohen has a score to settle.
⚔️ guess you've got to chaperone him up to dornman port...
⚔️ capturing him was your worst idea yet.
⚔️ new! what a...conveniently compromising position! NSFW-ish, blood, biting
⚔️ since when does lohen go to church??
⚔️ make your own scenario!
